question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 50.00% on 2026-02-28 for the Metaculus question "Will the United States attack Iran before April 2026?"?
summary: Meta-prediction on whether the Metaculus CP for "Will the United States attack Iran before April 2026?" will be strictly above 50% on Feb 28. The underlying CP is currently exactly at 50%, having declined from 55-60% in late Jan/early Feb to ~45% in mid-Feb, then recovering to 50%. Today's second round of US-Iran nuclear talks in Geneva showed limited progress (understanding on "guiding principles"), which is mildly de-escalatory. However, massive US military buildup (two carrier groups, Pentagon preparing weeks-long operations) creates genuine escalation risk. The meta-question's own CP of ~45% suggests forecasters slightly favor NO. The diplomatic track provides modest downward pressure on CP, while military preparations provide upward pressure. With CP exactly at the threshold and 11 days remaining, I lean slightly toward NO given the active diplomatic process and recent declining CP trend.

factors.description: CP currently at exactly 50% — right at the threshold, need strictly above
CP declining trend from 55-60% (late Jan) to 45% (mid-Feb) before recovering to 50%
Second round of US-Iran nuclear talks showed some progress (understanding on guiding principles) — mildly de-escalatory
Trump said 'no rush' to make a deal, reducing immediate strike urgency
Meta-question CP at ~45% from 106 forecasters — slight NO lean
Major US military buildup: 2 carrier groups, Pentagon preparing weeks-long operations — genuine escalation risk that could spike CP
Iran closed Strait of Hormuz for live fire drills — provocative action that could escalate
Any military incident would asymmetrically spike CP well above 50% (tail risk favors YES)
CP was above 50% for 19/20 days Jan 22-Feb 9 — recent dip may be temporary

reasoning:
I need to analyze this meta-prediction question carefully. Let me start by getting the relevant data.Good. The underlying question is post_id 41594 (question_id 41340). Let me get the CP history for the underlying question and more details.Now let me search for recent news on US-Iran tensions and check prediction markets.Now let me save my findings and analyze the CP data computationally.Now let me save my findings and write the meta-reflection.**Forecast: 0.42** (42% probability that the CP will be strictly above 50% on Feb 28)

Key reasoning:

- **Current CP position**: Exactly at the 50% threshold — the most uncertain position possible for this question. Strictly above is required, so 50.00% = NO.
- **Recent trajectory**: CP declined from ~55-60% (late Jan/early Feb) to ~45% (mid-Feb), recovering to 50% over the last 2 days. The recent trend has been downward.
- **Today's developments**: Second round of US-Iran nuclear talks in Geneva ended with limited progress ("understanding on guiding principles") — mildly de-escalatory, which could push CP down.
- **Military buildup**: Two carrier groups deployed, Pentagon preparing for weeks-long operations — this is real and provides upward pressure on CP. Any incident would spike CP well above 50%.
- **Meta-question CP**: ~45% from 106 forecasters, confirming the slight NO lean.
- **Asymmetry**: Military escalation can spike CP dramatically upward, while diplomacy only gradually pushes it down — this tail risk partially offsets the de-escalatory trend.

The diplomatic track being active and the declining CP trend give a slight edge to NO, but the massive military buildup means YES remains very plausible.
resolution_reason: The meta-question has resolved to YES. According to the resolution criteria, if the target question (41594 about US attacking Iran before April 2026) resolves after the meta-question opens but before the critical timestamp (2026-02-28 11:51:38), then the meta-question resolves the same way as the target. The US and Israel launched strikes on Iran on February 28, 2026, starting at approximately 06:20 GMT - about 5.5 hours before the 11:51:38 GMT timestamp. Since the attack occurred before April 2026, the target question resolved to YES, and therefore this meta-question also resolves to YES.
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/41594) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-02-28 11:51:38 is higher than 50.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 50.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-02-28 11:51:38, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
